notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien grid, shields, UFO, wave progression, and audio; minor issue with prev-key tracking (prev is overwritten before update in loop causing slight input lag) and alien sprites are simplified pixel-art approximations but recognizable.
A critical state management bug (updating the 'prev' key state before checking it in the update loop) makes it impossible for the player to shoot, rendering the game unplayable.

Core loop, waves, shields, UFO, scoring, and collisions are present, but Enter/Space edge detection is flawed by shared prev-state handling so start/fire reliability is compromised despite otherwise solid presentation and no obvious crash-level errors.
